title: The Oscar
writer: Richard Sale, Harlan Ellison, Russell Rouse
actors: Stephen Boyd, Elke Sommer, Milton Berle
plot: Arrogant Hollywood actor Frankie Fane is nominated for the Best Actor Academy Award. His friend Hymie Kelly recalls their life together, Frankie's ruthless struggle to the top, and the people Frankie has used and abused to get there.
